summary: Typosquat impersonating Microsoft Playwright pulls unrelated sibling dependency
details: Package falsely attributes itself to Microsoft (`author: Microsoft Corporation`, `repository: github.com/microsoft/playwright` in package.json) and ships a wrapper that appears to be Playwright. However, package.json declares a runtime dependency on `venturo-playwright-core@1.0.5` — a name not published by Microsoft, who uses `playwright-core`. Additionally, `index.js:18` does `module.exports = require('playwright-core')` while the package only declares `venturo-playwright-core`, meaning the wrapper relies on the legitimate `playwright-core` being separately present while silently dragging the unrelated `venturo-playwright-core` package into the installer's dependency tree under cover of Microsoft attribution. Installers trusting the Microsoft branding will unknowingly install the attacker-controlled sibling package as a transitive dependency.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
